reason: Successfully navigated to the app, selected the target agent, verified it was in idle status, sent a math question message, and received a response containing the correct answer "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing two agents
Located and clicked agent "QA-20260526-222202-mznm" in the sidebar — Agent page opened and displayed the agent's home screen with message input
Verified agent status — Status indicator shows "idle" which satisfies the requirement of "running" or "idle"
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message appeared in the input field
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent to the agent, creating a new session titled "Basic Math Question Session"
Waited for agent response — Response received immediately showing "4" on the left side of the conversation
Took screenshot to verify response — Screenshot clearly shows the conversation with the agent's response containing "4"
